creator: laszlof@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

The previous list only shows ports that (ab)use X11BASE in pkg-plist.
There are 1551 ports that are installed into X11BASE and will need to be
moved. Some of these ports will still have files that are required to be
in X11BASE to function properly. Attempting to move 1551 ports, while in
the process of moving Xorg, is just asking for trouble IMO.

- -Frank
